summary: A clip from a Newsmax segment with a lower-third reading PHOENIX HOSTS BORDER SECURITY EXPO. It opens with outdoor footage of several people loading equipment near a building, then shows a man being interviewed by a reporter at an expo booth marked Homeland Security Investigations and HSI. An upcoming-segment panel appears in the lower right.

script.scene: Outdoor footage shows several people loading equipment near a building; lower-third reads NEWSMAX ON THE GROUND AT BORDER SECURITY EXPO.
A man is interviewed by a reporter at a booth marked Homeland Security Investigations and HSI; lower-third reads PHOENIX HOSTS BORDER SECURITY EXPO.
The interview continues at the HSI booth.
